notes:
v2.3.5 Update
⚡ Now supports Foundry VTT V13 and V14. Previous versions are no longer supported.
🐛 Action menu tooltip now hides immediately when clicking an item.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.3.5
announcement.content:
v2.3.5 — V14 Migration

  • ⚡ V14 Support: Now supports Foundry VTT V13 and V14.
  • 🐛 Tooltip: Action menu tooltip now hides immediately on item click.
